{{Quote|Princess, at last we meet.|Utric Sandov to Leia Organa|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>}}
'''Utric Sandov''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|spy]] who worked for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
During the war against the Empire, Utric Sandov was a [[Color/Legends|brown]]-[[Hair/Legends|haired]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] working as a [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|spy]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] at [[Ghost Base]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], he arranged a meeting with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] to discuss information that could be vital to the Rebel Alliance. However, when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Strike force Alpha|Strike Force Alpha]] invaded Ghost Base, Sandov had to flee to the island of [[Le'Roche]]. After Organa and the exiled [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] retook Ghost Base, Sandov contacted them from Le'Roche. He told them that the Empire had found the [[Vor'Na'Tu]], an ancient and powerful [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifact]].

==Behind the scenes==
Utric Sandov was voiced by [[Frank Welker]] in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. He appeared during the Leia Organa campaign, which was later included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
